♦ ♦ ♦

Teatro D'Agnelli

presents
♦ ♦ ♦

THE GRAND OPERA OF CLIENT EXCELLENCE

a performance in four acts | libretto by daniele d'agnelli

ACT I — THE OVERTURE

fifteen years of professional services. from the conservatory of bari to the grand stages of london. every performance, a new client. every client, a new aria.

ACT II — THE ARIAS

the swiss manufacturer: a sweeping production across 100+ venues. 2,000 in the audience. standing ovation: $18m ebit. the british telco: seven movements, one unified score. the american bank: 75,000 voices harmonised.

ACT III — THE REVIEWS

"nps above 70" — sustained across all engagements. "known for building trust-based client relationships." "adept at navigating ambiguity." the critics agree: this is not performance. this is presence.

ACT IV — THE ENCORE

the maestro continues. c3 ai. $15m production budget. 70+ in the ensemble. genai and rag systems now in the repertoire. the curtain does not fall.

[stage door] [programme] [github]
